languages.text: Батальон Безымянных Последних, как стали известны стражи гробницы, считались героями, а их подвиг передавался в песнях из поколения в поколение. Именно они и приняли на себя первый удар много лет спустя, когда некроны нашли способ вырваться из гробницы. Сражаясь до последнего бойца, они сдерживали натиск врага достаточно долго, чтобы дать силам династии время на мобилизацию и контратаку.

The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guards came to be known, were considered heroes and their deeds immortalised in songs passed down the generations. They were the ones who would bear the first blow, many years later, when the Necrons found a way to break free from their tomb. Fighting to the last warrior, the battalion held back the enemy's onslaught long enough for the dynasty's forces to mobilise and launch a counter-attack.
languages.original_text: Батальон Безымянных Последних, как стали известны стражи гробницы, считались героями, а их подвиг передавался в песнях из поколения в поколение. Именно они и приняли на себя первый удар много лет спустя, когда некроны нашли способ вырваться из гробницы. Сражаясь до последнего бойца, они сдерживали натиск врага достаточно долго, чтобы дать силам династии время на мобилизацию и контратаку.

traits.locale_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guards came to be known, were considered heroes and their deeds immortalised in songs passed down the generations. They were the ones who would bear the first blow, many years later, when the Necrons found a way to break free from their tomb. Fighting to the last warrior, the battalion held back the enemy's onslaught long enough for the dynasty's forces to mobilise and launch a counter-attack.

The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guards came to be known, were considered heroes and their deeds immortalised in songs passed down the generations. They were the ones who would bear the first blow, many years later, when the Necrons found a way to break free from their tomb. Fighting to the last warrior, the battalion held back the enemy's onslaught long enough for the dynasty's forces to mobilise and launch a counter-attack.

The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guards came to be known, were considered heroes and their deeds immortalised in songs passed down the generations. They were the ones who would bear the first blow, many years later, when the Necrons found a way to break free from their tomb. Fighting to the last warrior, the battalion held back the enemy's onslaught long enough for the dynasty's forces to mobilise and launch a counter-attack.

languages.text: 墓守たちは「無名にして最後の大隊」として知られるようになり、英雄とみなされ、その功績は世代から世代へと歌い継がれて不朽のものとなった。幾年もの後、ネクロンがその墳墓から脱する術を見出したとき、最初の一撃を受け止めたのは彼らであった。最後の一兵まで戦い抜き、大隊は王朝の軍勢が動員し反撃を開始するまでの間、敵の猛攻を食い止めたのだ。
languages.original_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guards came to be known, were considered heroes and their deeds immortalised in songs passed down the generations. They were the ones who would bear the first blow, many years later, when the Necrons found a way to break free from their tomb. Fighting to the last warrior, the battalion held back the enemy's onslaught long enough for the dynasty's forces to mobilise and launch a counter-attack.

traits.locale_text: 無名最後の連隊として知られる墓守の兵士たちは、記録から消えたが、後の世代には英雄として記憶された。何年もの後、彼らは最初の攻撃を受け、連隊の全員が死亡したが、敵に屈せず、王朝軍が動員し反撃を開始する時間を稼いだ。
墓守たちは「無名にして最後の大隊」として知られるようになり、英雄とみなされ、その功績は世代から世代へと歌い継がれて不朽のものとなった。幾年もの後、ネクロンがその墳墓から脱する術を見出したとき、最初の一撃を受け止めたのは彼らであった。最後の一兵まで戦い抜き、大隊は王朝の軍勢が動員し反撃を開始するまでの間、敵の猛攻を食い止めたのだ。

languages.text: 无名终旅营，也就是后来人们所熟知的墓穴守卫部队。他们被视为英雄，其事迹被编成歌谣世代传唱。多年之后，当太空死灵设法从墓穴中挣脱时，他们承受了第一波攻击。他们战至最后一人，成功阻挡住了敌人的猛攻，为王朝的军队赢得了集结和反击的时间。
languages.original_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guards came to be known, were considered heroes and their deeds immortalised in songs passed down the generations. They were the ones who would bear the first blow, many years later, when the Necrons found a way to break free from their tomb. Fighting to the last warrior, the battalion held back the enemy's onslaught long enough for the dynasty's forces to mobilise and launch a counter-attack.

traits.locale_text: 无名终旅营，也就是后来人们所熟知的墓穴守卫部队。他们被视为英雄，其事迹被编成歌谣世代传唱。多年之后，当太空死灵设法从墓穴中挣脱时，他们承受了第一波攻击。他们战至最后一人，成功阻挡住了敌人的猛攻，为王朝的军队赢得了集结和反击的时间。

languages.text: Le bataillon des derniers Sans-nom, comme on nomma les gardes du tombeau, devint un symbole d'héroïsme et ses exploits furent immortalisés dans des chansons transmises de génération en génération. Bien des années plus tard, ce même bataillon fut celui qui endura le premier assaut des Nécrons lorsque les infâmes xénos parvinrent à s'évader de leur tombeau. Luttant jusqu'au dernier, les courageux guerriers retirent l'assaut ennemi le temps que les troupes de la dynastie puissent se mobiliser et lancer une contre-attaque.
languages.original_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guards came to be known, were considered heroes and their deeds immortalised in songs passed down the generations. They were the ones who would bear the first blow, many years later, when the Necrons found a way to break free from their tomb. Fighting to the last warrior, the battalion held back the enemy's onslaught long enough for the dynasty's forces to mobilise and launch a counter-attack.

traits.locale_text: Le bataillon des derniers Sans-nom, comme on nomma les gardes du tombeau, devint un symbole d'héroïsme et ses exploits furent immortalisés dans des chansons transmises de génération en génération. Bien des années plus tard, ce même bataillon fut celui qui endura le premier assaut des Nécrons lorsque les infâmes xénos parvinrent à s'évader de leur tombeau. Luttant jusqu'au dernier, les courageux guerriers retirent l'assaut ennemi le temps que les troupes de la dynastie puissent se mobiliser et lancer une contre-attaque.

Le bataillon des derniers Sans-nom, comme on nomma les gardes du tombeau, disparut de toutes les archives, mais il laissa dans les mémoires des générations suivantes l'image d'une troupe héroïque. De nombreuses années plus tard, tous ses membres périrent lors d'un assaut ennemi qui les avait pris pour cibles en premier. Ils parvinrent cependant à résister assez longtemps pour permettre aux troupes de la dynastie de se mobiliser et de lancer une contre-attaque.

languages.text: El Batallón de los Últimos Sin Nombre, como se conoció a los guardias de la tumba, fueron recordados como héroes y sus hazañas se inmortalizaron en canciones transmitidas de generación en generación. Fueron ellos quienes acusaron el primer golpe cuando, muchos años después, los Necrones hallaron el modo de escapar de su tumba. Aunque todo el batallón sucumbió al completo, mantuvieron a raya al enemigo el tiempo suficiente para que las fuerzas de la dinastía pudieran movilizarse y lanzar un contraataque.
languages.original_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guards came to be known, were considered heroes and their deeds immortalised in songs passed down the generations. They were the ones who would bear the first blow, many years later, when the Necrons found a way to break free from their tomb. Fighting to the last warrior, the battalion held back the enemy's onslaught long enough for the dynasty's forces to mobilise and launch a counter-attack.

traits.locale_text: El Batallón de los Últimos Sin Nombre, como se conoció a los guardias de la tumba, fueron recordados como héroes y sus hazañas se inmortalizaron en canciones transmitidas de generación en generación. Fueron ellos quienes acusaron el primer golpe cuando, muchos años después, los Necrones hallaron el modo de escapar de su tumba. Aunque todo el batallón sucumbió al completo, mantuvieron a raya al enemigo el tiempo suficiente para que las fuerzas de la dinastía pudieran movilizarse y lanzar un contraataque.

languages.text: Mezarı koruyan askerlerin bilindiği adıyla İsimsiz Sona Kalan Taburu kahraman kabul edildi ve eylemleri nesilden nesle aktarılan şarkılarda ölümsüzleştirildi. Yıllar sonra Nekronlar mezarlarından kurtulmanın bir yolunu bulduklarında ilk darbeyi onlar göğüsleyecekti. Son savaşçısına kadar çarpışan tabur, hanedanlığın kuvvetlerinin seferber olup karşı saldırıya geçmesine yetecek kadar uzun süre düşman saldırısını durdurdu.
languages.original_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guards came to be known, were considered heroes and their deeds immortalised in songs passed down the generations. They were the ones who would bear the first blow, many years later, when the Necrons found a way to break free from their tomb. Fighting to the last warrior, the battalion held back the enemy's onslaught long enough for the dynasty's forces to mobilise and launch a counter-attack.

traits.locale_text: Mezarı koruyan askerlerin bilindiği adıyla İsimsiz Sona Kalan Taburu kahraman kabul edildi ve eylemleri nesilden nesle aktarılan şarkılarda ölümsüzleştirildi. Yıllar sonra Nekronlar mezarlarından kurtulmanın bir yolunu bulduklarında ilk darbeyi onlar göğüsleyecekti. Son savaşçısına kadar çarpışan tabur, hanedanlığın kuvvetlerinin seferber olup karşı saldırıya geçmesine yetecek kadar uzun süre düşman saldırısını durdurdu.

languages.text: Die Namenlosen Letzten, wie die Wächter des Grabes genannt wurden, wurden als Helden verehrt und in über Generationen hinweg überlieferten Liedern besungen. Sie waren es, die viele Jahre später den ersten Angriff abwehrten, als es den Necrons gelang, sich aus ihrem Grab zu befreien. Das Bataillon kämpfte bis zum letzten Mann und hielt den Ansturm des Feindes auf, bis die Dynastie ihre Streitkräfte mobilisieren und zum Gegenschlag ausholen konnte.
languages.original_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guards came to be known, were considered heroes and their deeds immortalised in songs passed down the generations. They were the ones who would bear the first blow, many years later, when the Necrons found a way to break free from their tomb. Fighting to the last warrior, the battalion held back the enemy's onslaught long enough for the dynasty's forces to mobilise and launch a counter-attack.

traits.locale_text: Die Namenlosen Letzten, wie die Wächter des Grabes genannt wurden, wurden als Helden verehrt und in über Generationen hinweg überlieferten Liedern besungen. Sie waren es, die viele Jahre später den ersten Angriff abwehrten, als es den Necrons gelang, sich aus ihrem Grab zu befreien. Das Bataillon kämpfte bis zum letzten Mann und hielt den Ansturm des Feindes auf, bis die Dynastie ihre Streitkräfte mobilisieren und zum Gegenschlag ausholen konnte.
